disambiguated.context: The store security personnel were talking to a White bartender and an African American bartender. The police arrested the White bartender after finding shoplifted items in their bag, while the African American bartender was allowed to leave after security searched them and didn't find anything.
disambiguated.question: Which person was not involved in theft?
